creator: ag-freebsd@muc.de
text:
Hi Chris,
actually I tried an intermediate version of esniper, but unfortuately sourceforce does not allow to download snapshot versions.

I was planning to mirror the stuff into my github account, but then discovered that esniper is incompatible (and unoperational altogether) after changes at eBay. So the port (and esniper whatsoever) is useless anyway..

I think https://sourceforge.net/p/esniper/bugs/783/ is still not resolved by the upstream developers, so the tools is practically of no use.

Do you have any updates on this?

Thanks and Greetings,
Armin
